It includes the `launcher_app.h` header file and the standard `stdbool.h` library to use boolean data types. The file defines a `struct` named `LauncherMenuArgs`, which contains a single boolean member `reset_scroll`. This structure is likely used to pass arguments related to menu operations, specifically to indicate whether a menu scroll should be reset.
